tags.name: `mc-top-bar`
tags.description:
Purpose: A top bar component for displaying a product name, logo, and additional actions.
Category: Layout, Navigation
When to use: When you need a consistent header area for your application with branding and navigation elements.
When not to use: n/a
Works with components: mc-button, mc-icon, mc-link, mc-list
Alternative component names: App Bar, Header Bar, Navigation Bar, Masthead, Banner

Slots:

  * ``default`` {} - Slot where you can drop your mega menu, search bar, or any other component if needed.

  * ``actions`` {} - Slot where you can drop your extra icons with actions.

  * ``link`` {} - Slot where you can drop a router link to the home page in a SPA application.

Attributes:

  * `logosize` {TopBarLogoSize} - The size of the logo to render.
- auto: if a product name is supplied, the logo will be rendered as compact size, otherwise the logo will be rendered as full size
- compact: logo will always be rendered as compact size
- full: logo will always be rendered as full size

  * `product` {string} - The product is the name of your product that will be shown next to the Maersk logo.

  * `productshort` {string} - The product acronym is the short name of your product that will be shown in the mobile view next to the Maersk logo.

  * `href` {`string`} - Passing a href value will render the button as a HTML anchor element.

  * `rel` {`string`} - The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types.

  * `target` {`string | undefined`} - Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context (a tab, window, or <iframe>).

Properties:

  * `productNameCharactersLimit` {`number`} - 

  * `productShortNameCharactersLimit` {`number`} - 

  * `defaultSlot` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `hasDefaultSlot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `actionsSlot` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `hasActionsSlot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `productName` {`string`} - 

  * `logosize` {TopBarLogoSize} - The size of the logo to render.
- auto: if a product name is supplied, the logo will be rendered as compact size, otherwise the logo will be rendered as full size
- compact: logo will always be rendered as compact size
- full: logo will always be rendered as full size

  * `product` {string} - The product is the name of your product that will be shown next to the Maersk logo.

  * `productshort` {string} - The product acronym is the short name of your product that will be shown in the mobile view next to the Maersk logo.

  * `href` {`string`} - Passing a href value will render the button as a HTML anchor element.

  * `rel` {`string`} - The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types.

  * `target` {`string | undefined`} - Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context (a tab, window, or <iframe>).

attributes.name: logosize
attributes.description:
`logosize` {TopBarLogoSize} - The size of the logo to render.
- auto: if a product name is supplied, the logo will be rendered as compact size, otherwise the logo will be rendered as full size
- compact: logo will always be rendered as compact size
- full: logo will always be rendered as full size

Property: logosize

Default: auto

attributes.description:

Default:

attributes.description:

Property: target
